name: praxis
description: Claude Code skills for the software delivery lifecycle. Two plugins: 'praxis' (six SDLC expert skills + /new-feature orchestrator) and 'skill-factory' (the skill-creator meta-skill + authoring tooling).

plugins.name: praxis
plugins.description: Six self-contained SDLC expert skills + per-expert commands + /new-feature orchestrator.

plugins.name: skill-factory
plugins.description: skill-creator meta-skill + /validate-skills + factory tooling for authoring new skills.
